About Audra

I photograph the in-between moments — the real ones

I'm Audra Bellon, a 30A-based photographer who fell in love with this stretch of coast and never left. I've spent over a decade learning how the light moves here — how it turns the water jade at dusk, and how it catches your daughter's hair right before she laughs.

My sessions are unhurried, relaxed, and built around the way your family actually is together — not a stiff pose but a walk, a story, a stolen glance. My approach blends fine-art portraiture with the warmth of documentary storytelling.

Whether you're here for one week a year or have made Rosemary Beach your forever home, I want to give you images you'll frame, share, and return to for decades.

Audra Bellon

Sessions & Investment

Photography tailored
to your moment

Every session includes pre-session styling guidance, a curated gallery of fully edited images, and personal print recommendations. Most sessions are booked at golden hour — that hour before sunset when 30A glows.

01
Family Sessions

One to two hours of unhurried portrait time along the beach, dunes, or a location that means something to your family. Ideal for groups of 2–12.

Starting at $1,500
02
Couple & Engagement

Romantic, genuine portraits for couples — newly engaged or celebrating decades together. 30A's light was made for love stories.

Starting at $1,200
03
Mini Sessions

Thirty focused minutes, a tight gallery of heirloom images. Perfect for returning clients, single subjects, or those seeking a curated capsule.

Starting at $650

How It Works

Simple. Personal. Memorable.

From first message to finished gallery, the experience is designed to feel effortless — and the images are designed to last a lifetime.

01
Reach Out

Send a quick inquiry with your dates, location preference, and session type. I'll respond within 24 hours to check availability.

02
Planning Call

We'll talk through outfit guidance, locations, timing, and the vibe you're going for. This is also where I learn your family's story.

03
Golden Hour Session

We meet at the chosen location as the light softens. I guide gently while keeping things natural — no forced smiles, just real moments.

04
Gallery Delivery

Your curated gallery of fully edited, high-resolution images is delivered within 3 weeks via private online gallery — ready to download, print, and keep forever.

Client Love

Words from the families I've photographed

Audra has photographed our family three years in a row on 30A. Every single time she captures something we didn't know was there — a look between my husband and our son, a quiet laugh. These images are treasures.

The Morrison Family
Rosemary Beach, Annual Session

We were skeptical about a beach session — we're not really "photo people." Audra changed that completely. She made us feel so comfortable and the images don't even look like us but somehow are exactly us.

Sarah & James Hartley
WaterSound, Couple Session

Booking Audra was the best decision of our vacation. We come to 30A every summer and this year we finally have images to match the memories. Worth every penny and then some.

The Calloway Family
Seaside, Family Session

Ready to book your 30A session?
